name: Crock Pot Lemon Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Dredge the chicken in flour mixed with salt. Shake off excess and brown in a hot skillet.
2. Remove the chicken and add it to the crockpot.
3. Mix together the frozen lemonade, brown sugar, Balsamic vinegar (or regular vinegar if preferred), and catsup.
4. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
5. Cook on high for 3-4 hours.
6. When ready to serve, remove the chicken to a warm platter.
7. Thicken the sauce with the cornstarch/water solution.
8. Serve along with the chicken.
Carole Comments: This is easy and tastes almost like the Lemon Chicken you get in a Chinese Restaurant.
